summary: Good Friday: Markets closed. Art Basel HK report strong sales. US Art market recovering.
Nasdaq up 1.2%, Tesla down 5.4%. Print sector demand surging, IFPDA fair upcoming.
Markets opening with a focus on tech sector volatility. New exhibitions in Seoul gaining traction.

Markets opening with a focus on tech sector volatility. Global economic indicators suggest a cautious start. New exhibitions in Seoul art galleries are gaining traction. Digital art market shows stability.
